title: Oasis Velvet Symphony Suede Hat Box Set of 3 Florist Lined (Light Pink)
features: Set of 3 Elegant VELOUR / SUEDE Light Pink Hat Boxes
Perfect for on trend floral and plant arrangements
Adds a wow factor to any flower arrangement
Each Hat Box comes with its own plastic removable liner for use with fresh floral arrangments
Dimensions approx. Large - 15 cm Height - 19cm Diameter. Medium 13cm Height 17cm Diameter. Small 11.5cm height 14cm
